ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division to which the team belongs */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "season" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with these statistics */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins during the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses during the season */,
  "win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage calculated from wins and losses */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played during the season */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Record of games played at home */,
  "road_record" TEXT /* Record of games played on the road */,
  "divisional_record" TEXT /* Record of games played against divisional opponents */,
  "season" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "rebounds_for" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the team */,
  "rebounds_against" INTEGER /* Total rebounds against the team */,
  "assists_for" INTEGER /* Total assists by the team */,
  "assists_against" INTEGER /* Total assists against the team */,
  "turnovers_for" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the team */,
  "turnovers_against" INTEGER /* Total turnovers against the team */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "home_win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage for home games */,
  "road_win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage for road games */,
  "divisional_win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage for divisional games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the division belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Division to which the team belongs
Unique identifier for each set of statistics
ID of the team associated with these statistics
Winning percentage calculated from wins and losses
Total games played during the season
Record of games played at home
Record of games played on the road
Record of games played against divisional opponents
Total points scored by the team
Total points scored against the team
Conference to which the division belongs
Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin)
Timestamp when the user account was created
